reviews.review_description: Game
I'm not into PvP so I didn't like it.  Nice graphics. Was only able to play against AI .

I'm not able to get myself a quest just yet, but I've managed to find a handful of solid games on the go, and of them all my favorite is Wands. 

It's the only game that constantly has people playing online if you don't know anyone else who has an Oculus...and there's just something about the combination of good graphics, simple gameplay mechanics, and room to always improve your strategy that makes this game a must-have for anyone looking to game on the go. It's a game you can play in 10 minute sessions or for hours at a time and it's always a good time. 

And from what I've seen, the developers seem very involved with the game, and hopefully more content is planned for the future so this game never gets old. Thanks for the awesome game 😊

developer_response.body: Wow, thanks! That's great to hear. Feel free to join us at www.discord.gg/wands if you haven't already!

reviews.review_description: Been playing for a little over a month now and this is my favorite game on oculus go. I don't know why there are not more people in the lobby. Great game!

Wands is a no messing professionaly produced VR game, graphically second to none. I would like to see a sequel to this game.
Truly immersive experience in beautifuly  produced surroundings, I just marvel at the surroundings every time I play Wands. This game truly deserves every award it gets !
Keep em coming !

developer_response.body: Thanks for the amazing review, philg7onr123! We're glad you love the game and we'll continue improving it!

reviews.review_description: You have to consent to allowing the developer collecting your personal data at the beginning. There's no need for this so be aware. I also didn't like the disclaimer at the beginning telling me all sorts of negative things. Wouldn't have bought it if I'd known all the sneaky stuff.

developer_response.body: The EULA is necessary for legal reasons, as is the case with nearly all software you install. I can assure you that nothing sneaky is going on. We only collect data that's used for the game to function, and we don't sell any data to third parties. As stated in the User Rights section of the EULA, you're free to request information on your collected data and/or request for it to be deleted. Also, the EULA can be viewed before purchasing the game by clicking the "Terms of Service" or "Privacy Policy" links on the game's Oculus store page.

reviews.review_description: An extremely fun game.
For sure worth the money. Could be expanded with more spells and maybe a 2v2 mode
The game is solid and has many ways to play but adding more spells would be even better.

I have had a Go for a few weeks and I bought wands to start me off. I have not had a better experience on the Go and the graphics are amazing. It is nice to see it is still getting updates. Worth the money.

developer_response.body: That's awesome to hear! Thanks, Alidabear

reviews.review_description: Alright, to start off I absolutely LOVE this game! A quick suggestion though, maybe make a 2v2 match, or a super big war match, maybe 10v10. Thanks for listening!

This is an amazing game. Excellent graphics, gameplay, and multiplayer. Its definitely one of the better games I've play on my Oculus go, quest, and on psvr. I love this game so much. Only downside is it crashes sometimes but not so much that I can't just reboot and continue. It's very minut issue.

developer_response.body: Thanks, krisskrossboy! If you'd like to join the community at www.discord.gg/wands, we'd love to have you! :)

reviews.review_description: This game has brought so much joy in my life

developer_response.body: That makes us so happy to hear. Thank you for playing 😂

reviews.review_title: Great game, good for people new to VR
reviews.review_description: I just recently got my headset and this is the first game I paid for on vr. Its a great game and the concept is really good. One of the problems I had is that I went though a some lag every now and then but other then that its great👍 highy recommend.

developer_response.body: We're glad you're enjoying the game! Wands uses peer-to-peer connections for duels, so any lag you experienced against another player results from one of you having a bad connection. However, if you're experiencing any kind of lag against the AI, that's a bug and you can let us know about it at support@cortopia.com

reviews.review_description:
Firstly, I am not a gamer. I prefer the slower, take your time and work things out type of games. I saw this in the store, read the reviews & decided to give it a go. Well, I'm very glad I did.
The gameplay is straightforward with a good tutorial to start with to get yourself set up. The graphics on my Oculus Go are excellent and smooth.  Now the fun really starts.
Early on in the game by playing the tutorials and against the AI, you will gain in game credits and currency, that will give you the option to add more spells. Then you need to play and practice. So far, I am loving playing and practicing.
Now what I would say, from what I've experienced so far, is that although I had quite a few spells and managed to unlock a second set up for my wand...all that did for me was to complicate things. Using the Oculus Go controller is not as accurate as I would like. As such I could get myself in a muddle trying to remember what spells I had put on the wand, where they were on the touchpad and getting my thumb to click on the right area. Now I have 4 spells that I am happy with on my wand, I know where they are to activate on the touchpad, so if the spell I wanted isn't cast, I know I've not hit the right spot on the controller. This makes things much easier and better gameplay for me, easier and quicker to correct.
I also bought the Assassin outfit and the lion wand, thinking it would give me a boost. According to the Wiki page for this game, these do not provide any sort of boost, they are aesthetic.
So all in all, I think this is a great game with a good potential to develop grow within it.

developer_response.body: We're glad you're enjoying the game! A trick that lots of players use is always having similar spells in the same position on their wand. For example, the top slot would always have a defensive spell, the bottom slot would always have a cheap attack, and so on. This way, even when you're using different loadouts, you'll be able to use the right spell reflexively.

reviews.review_title: Great game, not right for the go.
reviews.review_description: the gameplay takes some getting used to and has one or two of the classic VR limitations, but they utilized the system the best they could, and made a great  VR game with a great community whose friendliness and helpfulness are too awesome to explain with words. My only complaint worth docking a star is that the spell selection system is not all that good even though it’s probably the best you can come up with on the Go, witch is why I’m not docking a star. We just need more buttons

developer_response.body: Thanks, alfalf! Have you tried the Press control scheme? That's as fast as we can possibly make spell selection with the Oculus Go controller. Otherwise, if you have a Bluetooth gamepad, you could give that a try!

reviews.review_description: Great Game!!! awesome mechanics, just one problem my swipe wont work... keep getting beatin by other players. Other than that game is great.
Game would be okay if people actually played it. Basically a waste of Money and wasn't even worth it... if the developer could give me my money back It would be appreciated.

developer_response.body: You should see more players online now that the game is available on other platforms. And we're also looking into adding other modes.

reviews.review_description: When I first downloaded the game I didn’t know what it was going to be exactly based on the preview. After downloading I found that it was a wizard themed online head to head. You join lobbies and are able to use your different spells and teleport. Overall the game is amazing, the graphics are impressive, the gameplay is smooth, and the online aspect is very cool. I would recommend this to anyone who is new to VR  and is looking for a cool game
Awesome game
